scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @split-pay/server dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @split-pay/web dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @split-pay/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @split-pay/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @split-pay/server build
